description_long: This is a solid-body electric guitar with a single cutaway design, finished in a glossy black color with white binding along the body and neck. The body features two chrome-covered humbucker pickups, a three-way toggle switch, and four control knobs for volume and tone adjustment. The neck is set-in and has a rosewood or similar dark wood fretboard with trapezoid inlays. The headstock is angled and fitted with six tuning pegs, three on each side, and a visible truss rod cover. The bridge is a classic Tune-o-Matic style with a separate stopbar tailpiece, both in chrome. The overall design and hardware suggest a Les Paul-inspired electric guitar, suitable for a variety of urban music settings.
description: A glossy black, single-cutaway electric guitar with chrome hardware, white binding, and dual humbucker pickups. It features a rosewood fretboard with trapezoid inlays and a classic angled headstock.
description_view_0: Side view showing the guitar's body thickness, chrome hardware, and the full length of the neck.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the dual humbucker pickups, control knobs, toggle switch, and fretboard inlays.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the body contour, bridge, and the neck's profile.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the body, the neck joint, and the headstock's rear profile.
attribute_headstock_design: Angled headstock with three tuning pegs per side, truss rod cover, and possible logo placement
